Authorization waiver: Octium Assurance AG
Authorization waiver: Octium Assurance AG
24.01.25
•
Licence
Octium Assurance AG, Austrasse 61, 9490 Vaduz, has waived its license as an insurance company issued by the FMA on 13 December 2001 in writing as of 31 December 2024.
As a result of the written waiver, the FMA has withdrawn Octium Assurance AG's license to operate the insurance business pursuant to Art. 11 para. 1 VersAG in all branches as of 31 December 2024 at its request.
This content has been translated using a fully automated machine translation tool. Some content may not be accurately translated.
